details.test: Task 1: Start application for highest-paying weekend-only position within 10 miles
Task 2: Favorite the best-rated club paying at least $70/hour base
Task 3: Submit quick application for evening role with minimum shifts
Task 4: Book audition next Friday evening at club with private rooms and no house fee
Task 5: Estimate weekly income at 20% commission club and save estimate
Task 6: Enroll in beginner workshop under $100 starting within the next 30 days
Task 7: Send recruiter message with questions about dress code, schedule, and transportation
Task 8: Create candidate profile with specific preferences and availability
Task 9: Add best-rated late-night club with $150+ audition bonus to Late Night Options list
